dependencies: Limited number of communications satellites available for transmission of programming
Dependence on satellite systems to transmit broadcast and cable networks to affiliates
Reliance on cloud services, content delivery and other networks, information systems and technologies for production and distribution
risks: Failure or destruction of satellites or transmitter facilities could materially adversely affect business
FCC reallocation of satellite transmission spectrum (C-Band) reduces availability for television industry
Potential further reallocation of C-Band spectrum for commercial wireless/broadband services
Cybersecurity threats and attacks on network and information systems
Supply chain disruption from geopolitical events including tensions with China, North Korea, Russia and conflicts in Middle East and Europe

regulatory_risks: FCC regulations governing television broadcasting and station licensing
FCC ownership regulations including national television ownership cap (39% audience reach limit)
FCC dual network rules prohibiting common ownership of four major broadcast networks
Foreign ownership restrictions (25% limit on non-U.S. ownership of broadcast licensees)
Must-carry/retransmission consent regulations
Children's programming requirements and commercial limitations
FCC content regulations (obscenity, indecency, profanity restrictions)
Political advertising regulations and Emergency Alert System compliance
Closed captioning and audio description requirements
FTC regulations on unfair and deceptive advertising practices
State legislation on AI disclosure in political advertising
Privacy and data protection laws (CCPA, CPRA, Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Utah laws)
EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
UK, Canada, Australia, China, Mexico data protection legislation
Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA)
Video Privacy Protection Act (VPPA)
Telephone Consumer Protection Act
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act
U.S. national security restrictions on transfer of sensitive personal data
Data breach notification legislation (federal and all 50 states)
Consumer finance regulations (Truth-in-Lending Act, Equal Credit Opportunity Act, Fair Credit Reporting Act, Fair Housing Act, RESPA, UDAAP laws)
Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
SAFE Act (mortgage licensing)
State insurance licensing laws
Intellectual property laws and regulations
Tax law changes including The One Big Beautiful Bill Act of 2025
Communications Act and FCC rules governing broadcast licenses
FCC spectrum reallocation policies

sanction_risks: Ongoing tensions with China, North Korea, Russia may lead to cyberattacks or actions negatively impacting systems
Conflicts in Middle East and Europe may lead to cyberattacks or supply chain disruption
Nation state-sponsored cybersecurity activities and attacks
Geopolitical events may negatively impact advertising revenues
